title: Query Analysis Infrastructure
impact: Enables intelligent query understanding and automatic decomposition of complex queries

queryUnderstanding.target: Structured extraction of entities, dates, question types

tasks.title: Create Query Analysis Types
tasks.description: Define TypeScript interfaces for query analysis including QueryAnalysis, QueryPlan, and SubQuery.

implementation.purpose: Define types for structured query analysis results that enable intelligent search planning.
keyDecisions: QueryAnalysis extracts persons, locations, organizations, temporal range
Question types: factual, temporal, comparative, aggregation, multi-hop, conceptual

stepByStep.action: Add section comment for Query Analysis Types

acceptanceCriteria: QueryAnalysis interface defined with entity extraction fields
Question type union defined with 6 types (including 'conceptual')
QueryPlan interface defined with execution strategy
SubQuery interface defined with layer targeting

tasks.title: Create QueryAnalyzer Class
tasks.description: Create the query analyzer for extracting structured information from natural language queries using rule-based heuristics.

implementation.purpose: Extract structured information from queries to enable intelligent search planning. Uses rule-based heuristics for reliability.
keyDecisions: Rule-based extraction for persons (capitalized words after titles)
Temporal parsing for relative dates (yesterday, last week)
Question type detection based on keywords
Complexity estimation based on query length and structure

stepByStep.details: Create the new file in the search directory

stepByStep.code:
/**
 * Query Analyzer
 *
 * Phase 11: Extracts structured information from natural language queries
 * to enable intelligent search planning.
 *
 * @module search/QueryAnalyzer
 */

import type { QueryAnalysis, ExtractedEntity, TemporalRange } from '../types/index.js';

stepByStep.action: Add QueryAnalyzer class with analyzeBasic method

acceptanceCriteria: QueryAnalyzer class created with analyzeBasic method

tasks.title: Create QueryPlanner Class
tasks.description: Create the query planner that generates execution plans from query analysis.

implementation.purpose: Generate optimized execution plans for queries based on their analysis, selecting appropriate layers and execution strategies.
keyDecisions: Sequential execution when queries have dependencies
Layer selection based on query characteristics
Merge strategy based on query type

stepByStep.code:
/**
 * Query Planner
 *
 * Phase 11: Generates execution plans for queries based on analysis.
 *
 * @module search/QueryPlanner
 */

import type { QueryAnalysis, QueryPlan, SubQuery, SymbolicFilters } from '../types/index.js';

acceptanceCriteria: QueryPlanner class created with createPlan method
Layer selection based on query characteristics
Execution strategy selected based on dependencies
Merge strategy selected based on question type

tasks.title: Add analyze_query MCP Tool
tasks.description: Add MCP tool for exposing query analysis to AI assistants.

implementation.purpose: Expose query analysis capability via MCP so AI assistants can understand query structure before searching.
keyDecisions: Tool helps AI assistants optimize their search strategy

stepByStep.code:
import { QueryAnalyzer } from '../search/QueryAnalyzer.js';
import { QueryPlanner } from '../search/QueryPlanner.js';

tasks.title: Create Query Analysis Unit Tests
tasks.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for QueryAnalyzer and QueryPlanner.

implementation.purpose: Verify query analysis correctly extracts entities, temporal references, and classifies queries.
keyDecisions: Test person extraction with various patterns
Test temporal parsing for relative and absolute dates

successCriteria: All five tasks completed with passing tests
QueryAnalyzer extracts entities, dates, and classifies queries
notes: Query analysis uses rule-based heuristics for reliability
More sophisticated NLP can be added later without API changes
analyze_query tool helps AI assistants optimize search strategy
This sprint provides foundation for Sprint 4 (smart_search with reflection)
